etymology.description: 木(木, "tree") + 丮(丮, "to hold") -> kneeling person planting a sapling -> 坴(圥, soil) for 土, 木 corrupted to 坴, 丮 changed from 丸 -> 埶
etymology.interpretation: 埶 represents the concept of planting, showing a person holding and planting a sapling into soil. This imagery is appropriate for art as it reflects careful nurturing and creation. The character serves as the original form of 藝, reinforcing its association with cultivated skills.
